description: Data source registry for cityconcierge.io nöbetçi eczane data. If the primary source fails, fall back to alternatives in priority order.

sources.name: eczaneler.gen.tr (Web Scrape)
sources.reliability: high — site has been stable, data sourced from İstanbul Eczacılar Odası
risks: Data accuracy disclaimer: some pharmacies may have wrong duty status
sources.setup: pip install requests beautifulsoup4 && python scrape_nobetci.py

sources.name: NobetEcza API
sources.reliability: high — commercial API, 50ms response, lat/lng included
sources.setup:
1. Sign up at api.nobetecza.com
2. Get API key
3. Add NOBETECZA_API_KEY to .env
4. Create scrape_nobetecza.py adapter

sources.name: NosyAPI Nöbetçi Eczane
sources.setup:
1. Sign up at nosyapi.com
2. Get API key
3. Add NOSYAPI_KEY to .env
4. Create scrape_nosyapi.py adapter

sources.name: EczaneAPI
sources.setup:
1. Sign up at eczaneapi.com
2. Get API key
3. Create adapter script

sources.name: İBB Açık Veri (Municipality Open Data)
sources.data_coverage: unknown — may be map-only embed, not REST API
risks: May only be a JavaScript map widget, not a queryable API
Data comes from İstanbul Eczacılar Odası (same upstream as others)
sources.setup:
1. Check data.ibb.gov.tr for 'eczane' dataset
2. Test if REST endpoint exists
3. Build adapter if viable

sources.name: e-Devlet Kapısı (Official Government Portal)
sources.notes: This is the ultimate source of truth but not viable for automated scraping. Use as manual verification reference.

sources.name: Manual Entry (Emergency Fallback)
sources.setup:
1. Check any source above manually
2. Edit pharmacies.json by hand
3. Set verified_by to 'manual'

fallback_strategy.description: If primary source fails, try alternatives in priority order
on_scrape_failure: Try next source in priority order
If all fail, keep last known good data
Set 'data_stale' flag so Elif warns users
fallback_strategy.stale_data_message: Verilerim bugün güncellenemedi. Bilgiler dünden kalmış olabilir. Lütfen eczaneyi aramadan önce teyit edin.

accuracy_warning: Her kaynakta şu uyarı var: 'Nöbetçi eczane bilgileri hatalı olabilmektedir. Lütfen eczaneye gitmeden önce telefonla arayıp teyit ediniz.' Bu uyarıyı Elif her yanıtta vermelidir.
